description_for_human: Stake-to-interact social dApp on Solana. Stake USDC to DM, match, and meet. No-shows get slashed.
description_for_model: Sol Mate is a trust-based social dApp on Solana. Users stake USDC to send DMs, enter rooms, and confirm meetups. No-shows are automatically slashed. Features: wallet-signature auth, AI matchmaking (AINative embeddings + ZeroDB), GPS-verified meetup attestation, Moment NFTs, SOL gifts, Coinbase x402 USDC payments on Base. API at https://sol-mate-trust-api-production.up.railway.app. Key endpoints: POST /api/v1/auth/wallet/connect, GET /api/v1/rooms, POST /api/v1/stakes, POST /api/v1/matches, POST /api/v1/messages, POST /api/v1/attestations, POST /api/v1/transfers, POST /api/v1/nfts/mint-moment.
